content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Theatre-Square". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1/A
content.inputFormat: The input consists of a single line containing three space-separated integers: n, m, a, where n and m are the dimensions of the theatre square in meters, and a is the area of each square tile in square meters.
content.outputFormat: Output the minimum number of square tiles required to cover the entire theatre square.

solution.approach: Calculate the total area of the theatre square and divide it by the area of each tile, then round up to the nearest whole number.

code.Python3:
import math
n, m, a = map(int, input().split())
print(math.ceil(n * m / a))
